system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sophia Silva. I need to talk to someone about a flight I had earlier this month that was canceled. Because of your airline, I missed a really important business meeting and it caused a lot of problems for me. I want to know what you’re going to do to compensate me for all the inconvenience and the fact that I missed my meeting. This isn’t just about a refund or a voucher—I want proper compensation for what I lost.

I’m sorry to hear about the inconvenience and the impact the canceled flight had on your business meeting. I want to help you as much as possible.

To review your situation and see what compensation options are available, could you please provide your user ID and the reservation ID for the affected flight? If you don’t have the reservation ID, I can look it up with your user ID. Once I have this information, I’ll confirm the details of your canceled flight and explain what compensation can be offered according to our policy.

My user ID is sophia_silva_7557. I don’t have the reservation ID handy right now, but you should be able to find it with my user ID. The flight was earlier this month, and it was supposed to get me to a business meeting that I missed because of your cancellation.

Honestly, I don’t want to hear about your standard vouchers or miles. I lost a major opportunity because of this. I need real compensation for the trouble and the professional loss I suffered. This was a huge deal for me, and I expect your airline to take responsibility. What are you going to do about it?

I apologize for the inconvenience. I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. 

To ensure your request is handled properly and to discuss compensation beyond standard vouchers or refunds, I will transfer you to a human agent who can address your concerns in detail.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I apologize for the inconvenience. I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. 

To ensure your request is handled properly and to discuss compensation beyond standard vouchers or refunds, I will transfer you to a human agent who can address your concerns in detail.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
